steps.title: Establish the lower bound
steps.content: The lowest recorded temperature was $28^\circ\text{F}$, so no recorded temperature can be below this value. Any recorded temperature $t$ satisfies: $$t \ge 28.$$

steps.title: Establish the upper bound
steps.content: The highest recorded temperature was $64^\circ\text{F}$, so no recorded temperature can exceed this value. Any recorded temperature $t$ satisfies: $$t \le 64.$$

steps.title: Evaluate each answer choice
steps.content:
• Choice A: $t \ge 92$ - this claims all temperatures are at least 92°F, which contradicts the given maximum of 64°F. Eliminated.
  • Choice B: $t \ge 64$ - this claims all temperatures are at least 64°F, but the minimum was 28°F. Eliminated.
  • Choice C: $28 \le t \le 64$ - this captures both bounds: temperatures are between 28°F and 64°F inclusive. Kept.
  • Choice D: $t \le 28$ - this claims all temperatures are at most 28°F, but the maximum was 64°F. Eliminated.
That matches Choice C — $28 \le t \le 64$.
